assert_return mul-neg v128:00000000010000000200000003000000 v128:02000000020000000200000002000000 -> v128:00000000fefffffffcfffffffaffffff
assert_return sub-neg v128:00000000010000000200000003000000 v128:00000000010000000200000003000000 -> v128:00000000fefffffffcfffffffaffffff
